name: Files
description: File storage for Claude — read, write, list, move and delete files inside one jailed root folder (map a host folder to it in Docker).

settings.label: Root folder
settings.help: Container path every tool is jailed to. Blank = the FILES_DIR env var, else /files. Map a host folder to it in Docker, e.g. /mnt/user/appdata/mcp-files → /files.
